data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for defaults per checklist template binding.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having defaults per checklist template binding. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for defaults per checklist template binding, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented or operational, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming defaults per checklist template binding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
